name: an error-level finding from any tool turns the SARIF bus verdict red
command: node -e 'process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({version:"2.1.0",runs:[{tool:{driver:{name:"checkov"}},results:[{ruleId:"CKV_AWS_18",level:"error",message:{text:"S3 access logging disabled"},locations:[{physicalLocation:{artifactLocation:{uri:"main.tf"},region:{startLine:1}}}]}]}]}))' > red.sarif; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/sarif-aggregate.sh" --in red.sarif 2>e.txt; grep -q 'sarif-aggregate status=red' e.txt && echo bus-error-turns-red 1>&2
